title: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean

seo.title: Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Recipe - Easy & Delicious
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread at home! This easy recipe brings the viral Korean bakery favorite to your kitchen. Get ready for a sweet and savory treat.

seo.imageAlt: Freshly baked Korean cream cheese garlic bread, golden brown with a creamy filling, ready to serve.
seo.imageCaption: Indulge in the viral sensation! Our homemade Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread is perfectly sweet, savory, and irresistibly soft.

description: Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread is a delightful sweet and savory pastry that has taken the world by storm. Soft, fluffy bread is generously filled with a sweet cream cheese mixture and then dipped in a rich, aromatic garlic butter sauce. This viral bakery sensation offers a unique blend of textures and flavors, perfect as a snack or a decadent breakfast.

ingredients.item: Round bread buns or small French baguettes

instructions.title: Prepare the Bread
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 160°C (325°F). Take each bread bun and cut it into 6-8 wedges, making sure not to cut all the way through so the bottom remains intact and holds the bread together.

instructions.title: Make the Cream Cheese Filling
instructions.text: In a medium bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, 30g granulated sugar, 2 tablespoons heavy cream, and 1 tablespoon milk. Mix thoroughly with a whisk or spatula until the mixture is smooth and creamy. Transfer this sweet cream cheese filling into a piping bag for easy application.

instructions.title: Prepare the Garlic Butter Dip
instructions.text: In a separate bowl, melt the unsalted butter. To the melted butter, add the minced garlic, 1 tablespoon granulated sugar, dried parsley, the beaten egg, and 3 tablespoons milk. Whisk all the ingredients together until they are well combined and form a fragrant, slightly emulsified dip.

instructions.title: Fill the Bread with Cream Cheese
instructions.text: Take your piping bag filled with the cream cheese mixture and generously pipe the filling into each of the cuts you made in the bread buns. Ensure that the creamy filling is evenly distributed throughout the bread, reaching deep into the crevices.

instructions.title: Dip the Bread in Garlic Butter
instructions.text: Carefully take each cream cheese-filled bread bun and dip it completely into the garlic butter mixture. Make sure all sides, especially the cut surfaces, are thoroughly coated with the rich garlic butter. Allow any excess dip to drip off before proceeding.

instructions.title: Bake to Golden Perfection
instructions.text: Place the fully coated bread buns on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake in the preheated oven at 160°C (325°F) for 15-20 minutes, or until the bread turns a beautiful golden brown and the cream cheese filling appears bubbly and slightly caramelized.

instructions.title: Serve Warm
instructions.text: Once baked, remove the Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread from the oven and let it cool slightly on a wire rack for a few minutes. If desired, garnish with a sprinkle of fresh chopped parsley before serving. This delightful treat is best enjoyed warm, savoring the contrast of sweet and savory flavors.

tips: For the best texture, ensure your cream cheese is at room temperature before mixing to prevent lumps in the filling.
If you dont have piping bag, you can use a resealable plastic bag with a corner snipped off to pipe the cream cheese filling.
To store leftovers, wrap the bread tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate for up to 2-3 days. Reheat gently in an oven or air fryer for best results.
article: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean is a beloved Korean Baking dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
